processing: Cropped the platform-generated raster key art to remove an erroneous device mockup frame; converted the cropped image to PNG and resized it to 1024x1024. No SVG, CSS, Canvas artwork, game screenshot, ComfyUI, local workflow, or deprecated endpoint was used.

review.original_1024: Approved: title is legible in the top safe area and the crystal portal remains the primary subject.
review.thumbnail_160: Approved: title, central luminous hand, and crystal halo remain identifiable.
